summary: Tested Coach Onboarding Sequence (Phase 3, Item #3) - all features verified working. 13/13 backend tests pass. Full UI flow tested end-to-end.

issues: Position pill selected state uses border-blue-500 class but CSS specificity may cause it to not visually highlight clearly - minor visual feedback concern

features_verified.step0_welcome: PASS - Modal shows coach first name 'Test', 3 feature cards, 'Let's Get Started' and 'Skip for now' buttons
features_verified.step0_data_testids: PASS - onboarding-modal, onboarding-start-btn, onboarding-skip-btn all present
features_verified.step1_preferences: PASS - Position pills (onboarding-pos-PG etc) and grad year pills present, Save & Continue (onboarding-save-prefs-btn) works
features_verified.step2_player_search: PASS - Player search box (onboarding-player-search) visible, players auto-load, Save buttons work
features_verified.step2_continue_gated: PASS - Continue button (onboarding-continue-btn) disabled until player saved, enables after save
features_verified.step3_completion: PASS - Checkmark screen shows, 'Go to Dashboard' button (onboarding-complete-btn) works, closes modal
features_verified.skip_behavior: PASS - Skip sets localStorage key cb_coach_onboarding_dismissed_<coachId>, modal doesn't reappear on refresh
features_verified.dashboard_checklist: PASS - onboarding-checklist visible with progress bar and 5 step items
features_verified.reopen_wizard_btn: PASS - reopen-wizard-btn present and reopens modal
features_verified.search_done_tracking: PASS - Visiting /coach/players marks search_done=true in onboarding_steps
features_verified.profile_viewed_tracking: PASS - Visiting /coach/players/:userId marks profile_viewed=true in onboarding_steps
features_verified.elite_recruiter_badge: PASS - data-testid=elite-recruiter-badge appears when all 5 steps completed
features_verified.backend_reset: PASS - PATCH /api/coach/auth/profile with onboarding_completed=false, onboarding_steps={} resets state correctly

critical_code_review_comments: CoachOnboardingModal Step 2 save triggers markOnboardingStep('search_done') but this is arguably incorrect - search_done should mean the coach ran a player *search* not just saved in the modal. CoachPlayersPage.js already correctly marks search_done on any page load. This double-tracking is benign but imprecise.

handleComplete in modal sets onboarding_steps without including search_done/profile_viewed already tracked - the spread only includes prefs_set from current coach state which could overwrite steps if backend returns stale data. Minor risk of data loss.
seed_data_creation: Player 'Daniel Orodje' saved to coach's Watch List during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Coach Onboarding Sequence fully working. Test coach: testcoach@courtbound.edu / coach1234. To test onboarding modal: PATCH /api/coach/auth/profile with {onboarding_completed: false, onboarding_steps: {}} + clear localStorage key cb_coach_onboarding_dismissed_<coachId>. All 10 test items from review_request verified passing.
